positive: A stylized, symmetrical arrangement of celestial and botanical elements. The central subject is a majestic crescent moon nestled among swirling nebulae of deep indigo and vibrant teal, accented by delicate glowing floral trails and stylized constellations of gold leaf. Use a 'sacred geometry' aesthetic mixed with 'art nouveau' lines. The overall composition should have a strong, clean silhouette, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Use high contrast, deep jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst), and metallic gold accents. The design must be highly detailed yet easily readable, suitable for single-color or two-color printing against a dark background. Vector art style, clean lines, graphic illustration, 8K resolution.
negative: blurry, realistic photo, low contrast, grain, artifacts, watermarks, text, signatures, logos, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, amateur, ugly
